message.content:
@startuml
skinparam handwritten true
skinparam backgroundColor #EEEEEE
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam participantStyle uml2
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BorderColor #000000
}

title Please use '!option handwritten true' to enable handwritten

box "NSheets Client" #LightGray
  participant "User" as User
  participant "HomeView" as HomeView
  participant "HomePresenter" as HomePresenter
end box

box "Server" #LightGray
  participant "NoteServices" as NoteServices
  participant "ListNoteController" as ListNoteController
  participant "NoteService" as NoteService
  participant "NoteRepository" as NoteRepository
end box

box "Database" #LightGray
  participant "Database" as Database
end box

User -> HomePresenter: onReveal() / navigate to page
HomePresenter -> NoteServices: getNotes()
NoteServices -> ListNoteController: listNotes()
ListNoteController -> NoteService: allNotes()
NoteService -> NoteRepository: findAll()
NoteRepository -> Database: fetch
NoteServices --> HomePresenter: onSuccess()
HomePresenter --> HomeView: setContents()

@enduml
